sn38.2:1.1:
1
"‘Arahattaṁ, arahattan’ti, āvuso sāriputta, vuccati. Katamaṁ nu kho, āvuso, arahattan"ti?
sn38.2:1.2: "Yo kho, āvuso, rāgakkhayo dosakkhayo mohakkhayo – idaṁ vuccati arahattan"ti.
sn38.2:1.3: "Atthi panāvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā etassa arahattassa sacchikiriyāyā"ti?
sn38.2:1.4: "Atthi kho, āvuso, maggo atthi paṭipadā etassa arahattassa sacchikiriyāyā"ti.
sn38.2:1.5: "Katamo panāvuso, maggo katamā paṭipadā etassa arahattassa sacchikiriyāyā"ti?
sn38.2:1.6: "Ayameva kho, āvuso, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo etassa arahattassa sacchikiriyāya, seyyathidaṁ – sammādiṭṭhi … pe … sammāsamādhi. Ayaṁ kho, āvuso, maggo, ayaṁ paṭipadā etassa arahattassa sacchikiriyāyā"ti.
sn38.2:1.7: "Bhaddako, āvuso, maggo bhaddikā paṭipadā etassa arahattassa sacchikiriyāya. Alañca panāvuso sāriputta, appamādāyā"ti.
